concerns.note: Idea-maker task counter bug: jumped from 101 to 290 in run 171 cycle. Fixed counter to 102. The idea-maker prompt correctly says 'increment' (rule 6) but the AI agent produced a bad value. This is a one-time hallucination — monitoring next cycle to confirm. If it recurs, will add stronger guardrails to the prompt (e.g., explicit 'add 1 to current value' with example).
